torch_pattern: cos, sin = rot_mats[0], rot_mats[1]; q_embed = (q * cos) + (rotate_half(q) * sin); k_embed = (k * cos) + (rotate_half(k) * sin)  # two sibling HF-style RoPE branches (Q and K) sharing the same cos/sin inputs, taken from _hf_rope_decode fallback at the call site

config_template.notes: Q and K must be moved to a common fused QK memory config before the call (to_qk_fused_memory_config); inputs deallocated immediately after the op in decode loop. BATCH must match padded batch used by rot_mats and nlp_create_qkv_heads_decode output to avoid host shape reads during trace/graph capture.

weight_transform: Precompute cos/sin rotary matrices per position as ttnn tensors (rot_mats[0]=cos, rot_mats[1]=sin) and a static transformation matrix (transformation_mats['decode']) that implements rotate_half as a matmul; replicate transformation matrix across shard cores for decode.
applicability_notes: torch_pattern_source: model call site (_hf_rope_decode reference: 'cos, sin = rot_mats[0], rot_mats[1]' applied to both q_heads_pre_rot_1BQD and k_heads_pre_rot_1BKD)

memory_config.shard_spec_template: fused QK shard via self.to_qk_fused_memory_config(q, k); one shard per (batch x head) row, shard shape [{TILE_H}, {HEAD_DIM}]

placement_observations.source: call_site: q/k passed through to_qk_fused_memory_config immediately before fused_qk rope in decode path

memory_config.shard_spec_template: same fused QK memory config as Q (to_qk_fused_memory_config), co-resident with Q shards

placement_observations.source: call_site: k aligned to fused QK memory config alongside q before op; deallocated right after

placement_observations.size_descriptor: decode-shape [1, 8, 8, 128] each (per inline comment at call site)

memory_config.shard_spec_template: inherits fused QK sharded config; consumed directly by KV-cache update in decode loop

placement_observations.source: call_site: '# [1, 8, 8, 128], [1, 8, 8, 128]' comment; outputs feed KV update with inputs deallocated
